# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately to: security@example.com (replace with your operational security inbox).

Include:
- Impacted component(s)
- Reproduction details
- Suggested mitigation if known

## Supported Scope
This repository's automation, scripts, and docs are in scope. Third-party TAK binaries/components follow their own vendor security channels.
